remedies.detail: Recite the Aditya Hridayam hymn (108 verses) on Sundays at sunrise, facing east.
Chant 'Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryaya Namah' 7,000 times over 40 days, starting on a Sunday.
Wear a natural Ruby of at least 3–5 carats set in gold on the ring finger of the right hand. Energise on a Sunday morning.
Donate wheat, jaggery (gur), copper vessels, or red cloth to a temple or the needy on Sundays.
Feed a cow with wheat bread every Sunday to strengthen the Solar principle.
Fast on Sundays from sunrise to sunset, consuming only fruit and water. Break the fast after sunset with a single meal.
Chant 'Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah Chandraya Namah' 11,000 times over 40 days. Begin on a Monday evening.
Recite 'Om Tryambakam Yajamahe…' 108 times daily, especially on Mondays, for emotional stability and Lunar strength.
Wear a natural, lustrous Pearl set in silver on the little finger of the right hand. Best worn on a Monday morning.
Donate white rice, milk, curd, or white cloth to a Shiva temple on Mondays or on the night of the full moon.
Donate silver utensils or white sweets on Mondays to strengthen the Moon.
Fast on Mondays for mental clarity and emotional balance. Consume milk and fruits only. Observe for 16 consecutive Mondays (Solah Somvar).
Chant 'Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah' 7,000 times starting on a Tuesday.
Recite the Hanuman Chalisa daily, especially on Tuesdays, to pacify an afflicted Mars and invoke its positive qualities.
Wear a natural Red Coral of 6–9 carats in gold or copper on the ring finger of the right hand. Set on a Tuesday morning after sunrise.
Donate red lentils (masoor dal), red cloth, copper, or sweets made from jaggery on Tuesdays.
Donating blood on Tuesdays is considered one of the most powerful remedies for Mangal Dosha.
Fast on Tuesdays, breaking the fast in the evening with a single meal free from salt. Observe for 21 Tuesdays for Mangal Dosha mitigation.
Chant 'Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah' 17,000 times starting on a Wednesday.
Recite the Vishnu Sahasranama on Wednesdays to strengthen Mercury and sharpen intellect and communication.
Wear a natural Emerald of 3–5 carats set in gold or silver on the little finger of the right hand. Best worn on a Wednesday morning.
Donate green moong lentils, green vegetables, green cloth, or books on Wednesdays.
Donate stationery, books, or sponsor education for an underprivileged child to strengthen Mercury.
Fast on Wednesdays, eating only once at noon. Consume green foods and avoid non-vegetarian meals. Observe for 21 Wednesdays.
Chant 'Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah' 16,000 times starting on a Thursday.
Recite this Vishnu mantra 108 times daily on Thursdays to invoke Jupiter's blessings of wisdom and prosperity.
Wear a natural Yellow Sapphire of 4–5 carats in gold on the index finger of the right hand. Energise on a Thursday morning.
Donate yellow lentils (chana dal), turmeric, yellow cloth, gold, or saffron on Thursdays.
Serve or make donations to a learned teacher, priest, or Brahmin on Thursdays to strengthen Jupiter.
Fast on Thursdays, eating only once in the evening. Wear yellow clothes and offer banana to Lord Vishnu. Observe for 16 Thursdays.
Chant 'Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah' 16,000 times starting on a Friday.
Recite the Lakshmi Ashtakam on Fridays to attract the blessings of Venus for love, beauty, and abundance.
Wear a natural Diamond of 0.5–1 carat set in platinum or silver on the middle finger of the right hand. Best set on a Friday morning.
An affordable alternative to Diamond — wear a White Sapphire of 4–5 carats in silver on the middle finger.
Donate white rice, white flowers, camphor, white sweets, or perfume to a Lakshmi or Durga temple on Fridays.
Fast on Fridays, consuming only milk and fruits. Dress in white and light a ghee lamp before the Goddess. Observe for 16 Fridays.
Chant 'Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah' 19,000 times starting on a Saturday.
Recite the Shani Chalisa every Saturday morning to appease Saturn and receive blessings of discipline and longevity.
Wear a natural Blue Sapphire (caution: must be tested first for 3 days) of 3–5 carats set in iron or silver on the middle finger.
A safer Saturn alternative — wear Amethyst of 6–8 carats in silver on the middle finger of the right hand.
Donate black sesame seeds (til), black cloth, mustard oil, iron utensils, or shoes to the needy on Saturdays.
Light a mustard oil lamp under a Peepal tree every Saturday evening and offer black sesame seeds.
Fast on Saturdays, eating only one meal of sesame-based food in the evening. Visit a Shani or Hanuman temple. Observe for 19 Saturdays.
Chant 'Om Bhram Bhreem Bhraum Sah Rahave Namah' 18,000 times starting on a Saturday evening.
Recite Chapter 11 of the Durga Saptashati (Narayani Stuti) on Saturdays to pacify Rahu's disruptive influence.
Wear a natural Hessonite Garnet of 6–8 carats set in silver or panchdhatu on the middle finger of the right hand on a Saturday.
Donate multi-coloured cloth, blankets, or dark blue items on Saturdays. Feed homeless people on a Saturday.
Float a coconut with a coin in a river or sea on a Saturday to release Rahu's grip on the mind.
Avoid starting new ventures during Rahu Kalam (1.5 hours each day based on weekday). Light a ghee lamp and chant Rahu mantra during that period instead.
Chant 'Om Sraam Sreem Sraum Sah Ketave Namah' 7,000 times starting on a Thursday or Saturday.
Recite the Ganesha Atharvashirsha on Thursdays to harmonise Ketu's spiritual energy and remove obstacles.
Wear a natural Cat's Eye Chrysoberyl of 6–8 carats set in silver or panchdhatu on the middle or ring finger. Energise on a Thursday.
Donate brown blankets, sesame seeds mixed with jaggery, or iron items on Thursdays or Saturdays.
Feed stray dogs with bread soaked in milk on Thursdays — a powerful remedy for a challenging Ketu.
Meditate in silence for 20 minutes daily at dawn, facing south. Practice non-attachment and service to elders or spiritual seekers to align with Ketu's karmic purpose.
